Services

Services

Some creators need one specific part of a project handled. This page covers recording, mixing, mastering, editing, voice work, custom music, and other individual production services.

Studio and Audio Recording, mixing, mastering, podcast editing, audio cleanup, and voice sessions.

Twirl Tape offers traditional studio services for creators who already know what they need, whether that is recording time, mixing, mastering, podcast editing, audio cleanup, or voice sessions.

Sessions are handled in a relaxed home-studio environment with professional production standards, clear project procedures, and experienced producers and engineers behind every project.

Every session is scoped before production begins, including the session needs, file prep, timeline, revisions, and delivery format.

For rates, booking details, and project fit, reach out through the contact page.

Video and Post Video editing and related post-production work for creators who need project support.

Twirl Tape offers video and post-production support for creators who need a defined project handled cleanly, whether that is a video edit, podcast video support, YouTube content, or audio post for a finished piece.

This service is best for focused, single-task jobs where the scope is clear before the session begins. Each project is reviewed ahead of time so we can confirm the files needed, the timeline, the revision process, and the final delivery format.

For ongoing creator support, recurring edits, planning help, podcast and video development, or projects that cross into multiple needs, Twirl Tape offers Creator Club, a session-based membership for planning, recording, editing, and finishing projects.

For rates, booking details, and project fit, reach out through the contact page.

Custom Voice Over Audio voice narration for projects where you need another voice.

Twirl Tape offers custom voice over for creators who need another voice for a project, whether that is narration, podcast support, video content, intros, guides, or other recorded material.

This service is handled like a standard studio or artist booking, with per-episode or per-hour rates depending on the project. Each project is reviewed ahead of time so we can confirm the script, recording needs, timeline, revision process, and final delivery format.

For rates, booking details, and project fit, reach out through the contact page.

Custom Music Custom theme music, background beds, beats, scoring, podcast music, YouTube music, and royalty-free project music.

Twirl Tape creates custom music for creators who need original sound for a project, from theme music and background beds to beats, scoring, podcast music, YouTube music, and royalty-free options for future releases.

This can be as simple as a short music cue or as involved as building a full piece around the tone, pacing, and feel of the project. We can play, record, arrange, produce, and help shape the music so it fits where it needs to go.

For bigger creative development, ongoing music needs, or projects that need more planning across audio, video, and production, Creator Club may be the better fit.

For rates, booking details, and project fit, reach out through the contact page.

Twirl Tape

studio@twirltape.com
